content: Audit all system logs for today (2026-03-25). Check `memory/logs/vault/sentinel_2026-03-25.jsonl`, `error.log`, `night_watch.log`, and `error_utf8.log`. Report findings.

### EMERGENCY PATCH DIRECTIVE (Infrastructure)
Audit results indicate the `agent-manager-skill` is failing on Windows because it attempts to call `tmux` (`error_utf8.log`). 

**Task:** Patch the infrastructure/scripts to remove Linux-specific dependencies (like tmux) and replace them with Windows-compatible alternatives. Apply 3-strike loop protection.

### CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE: CLINE-NEXUS BRIDGE
Draft and implement `workspace/skills/bridge_executor.py` to replace decommissioned Agent Zero dispatcher. Poll `vortex_state.json` and `night_watch.md`. Trigger Cline for queued tasks. Windows native only. Log to Sentinel Trace.
